Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: How This Graybeard Built the Fastest and Freest Postgres BM25 Search 23 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 25 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 57 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 38 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 225 upvotes, 68 comments
  7. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 100 upvotes, 26 comments
  8. GitHub's Historic Uptime 118 upvotes, 32 comments
  9. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 31 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 436 upvotes, 155 comments
  11. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1695 upvotes, 671 comments
  12. Combinators 113 upvotes, 34 comments
  13. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 85 upvotes, 24 comments
  14. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 309 upvotes, 130 comments
  15. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 106 upvotes, 38 comments
  16. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1654 upvotes, 824 comments
  17. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 226 upvotes, 101 comments
  18. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 39 upvotes, 12 comments
  19. RubyGems Fracture Incident Report 72 upvotes, 29 comments
  20. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 172 upvotes, 100 comments
  21. Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 216 upvotes, 137 comments
  22. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 26 upvotes, 11 comments
  23. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 105 upvotes, 67 comments
  24. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 734 upvotes, 612 comments
  25. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 31 upvotes, 16 comments
  26. Nematophagous Fungus 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Show HN: Cerno – CAPTCHA that targets LLM reasoning, not human biology 6 upvotes, 2 comments
  28. Show HN: PhAIL – Real-robot benchmark for AI models 12 upvotes, 8 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 85 upvotes, 141 comments
  30. Ask HN: Distributed data centers in our basements 25 upvotes, 45 comments

Last generated 4:00am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
